title: centranthus lecoqii subsp. maroccanus
intro: Centranthus lecoqii subsp. maroccanus, also known as Moroccan centranthus or red valerian, is a plant species in the family Valerianaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Centranthus lecoqii subsp. maroccanus include its potential to treat anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions due to its calming and soothing effects. Herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
